audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. Base fee validation correctly enforces EIP-1559 formula for all three scenarios (gas_used == target, > target, < target). Code delegates to alloy_eips::calc_next_block_base_fee with correct inputs (parent.gas_used, parent.gas_limit, parent.base_fee_per_gas, base_fee_params), performs strict equality check, and is called on all non-genesis blocks via validate_header_against_parent in both engine API and P2P sync paths.
